name: Alsatian Onion Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Firm tofu; crushed by hand
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onions and sauté until translucent, stirring occasionally. If needed, add 1/2 cup water to prevent burning.
2. Blend soy milk, tofu, salt, pepper, nutmeg, and flour together in a bowl until smooth.
3. Combine the sautéed onions, blended mixture, and couscous in another bowl.
4. Pour the filling into the prepared pie shell.
5. Bake at 350 degrees F for about 30 minutes.
